mathlib_note: lakefile.toml now DOES NOT require mathlib (removed in run4). Use stdlib-only tactics.

fv_targets.name: math::constrain
fv_targets.status: 8 theorems proved: constrain_ge_lo, constrain_le_hi, constrain_in_range, constrain_of_mem, constrain_of_lt_lo, constrain_of_gt_hi, constrain_idempotent, constrain_mono. 0 sorry.
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction - Int model, NaN not modelled

fv_targets.name: math::signNoZero
fv_targets.status: 6 theorems proved. 0 sorry. WARNING: NaN mismatch found - C++ float version returns 0 for NaN, violating signNoZero_ne_zero safety property for float callers.
fv_targets.correspondence: abstraction + mismatch for NaN - documented in CORRESPONDENCE.md

tool_recommendations.lean4_stdlib: primary - pure math functions (all current targets done)

tool_recommendations.cbmc: next recommended - C++ integer overflow, array bounds
tool_recommendations.infer: quick wins - memory safety, null dereference
tool_recommendations.tla_plus: arming FSM, mission FSM - temporal properties

notes: Mathlib REMOVED from lakefile.toml - use stdlib-only tactics (omega, simp, by_cases, native_decide)
split_ifs is NOT available without Mathlib - use by_cases + simp [show ...]
split_ifs requires Mathlib import - AVOID using split_ifs
For if-then-else goals: use by_cases on the condition, then simp [hcond] or simp [show not_cond from ...]
lake build passes with 0 sorry (all proofs complete, run 4)
signNoZero NaN bug: C++ returns 0 for NaN, documented in CORRESPONDENCE.md

Next target: interpolate (phase 1->5, boundary cases tractable, need Rat for interior)
